channel.title: Protocol on Mi&Bee Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Protocol on Mi&Bee Blog

item.title: Complete Distribution of the TCP/IP Protocol Suite in the OSI Model — Understanding Network Protocols at a Glance
item.description:
Network communication is the foundation of modern information technology. Using the OSI model as a framework, this article maps each protocol of the TCP/IP suite to its place in the network layer hierarchy, and illustrates how the protocols cooperate in scenarios such as web browsing and email sending, along with common diagnostic commands.

What is the OSI Model?

The OSI (Open Systems Interconnection) model is a conceptual network model that divides the network communication process into seven layers. Although this model is less popular in practice than the TCP/IP model, it is very helpful for understanding how network protocols work.
